constraints.description: Keep the implementation additive and focused on the new capability
constraints.rationale: A new feature should avoid redefining stable behavior outside the requested capability
constraints.verificationMethod: Review the change set to confirm it adds the new path without unrelated rewrites

constraints.description: Keep a rollback path available for the change
constraints.rationale: Minimizing risk requires an easy way to revert if issues appear
constraints.verificationMethod: Confirm the rollout can be disabled or reverted without manual data repair

constraints.description: Keep the change scope narrow to reduce regression surface area
constraints.rationale: Smaller changes reduce the number of failure modes introduced at once
constraints.verificationMethod: Review the touched files and modules for unnecessary breadth

constraints.description: Protect existing behavior with explicit regression coverage
constraints.rationale: Regression safety is part of the stated top priority
constraints.verificationMethod: Run targeted regression tests around existing behavior

constraints.description: Preserve compatibility guarantees with existing systems and interfaces
constraints.rationale: The feature must not break current integrations or established behavior
constraints.verificationMethod: Validate existing callers and integration tests continue to pass unchanged

inScope: Address the stated problem: 支持新场景

acceptanceCriteria.description: user-login addresses the stated problem: 支持新场景
user-login works for the target users: 内部开发者
user-login implementation reflects the selected priority: 风险最小
user-login respects the stated constraint: 兼容现有系统

goals: Serve target users: 内部开发者
nonGoals: Reworking existing behavior beyond what the new feature needs
testingStrategy: Use targeted tests and review to verify: 风险最小, 兼容现有系统
